title: His Physical Appearance 1 227 His Ancestry 1227 His Wives and Children 1 227 His Governors 1229 Aspects of His Conduct 1230 Bibliography of Cited Works
description: According to al-Wth-Ibn Sa'd Muhammad b. Umar-Abe Bakr b. 'AbdallAh b. Abi Sabrah-Ishaq b. 'Abdallah b. Abi Farwah: I asked Abu Ja'far Muhammad b. 'A1i914 "What did'All look like?" and he said, "A tawny man, markedly so, with heavy and large eyes, corpulent, bald, tending to shortness!' His Ancestry He was 'Ali b. Abi TAlih Aba Talib's personal name was'Abd Manaf b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim h 'Abd Manaf.. 'All's mother was FAtimah the daughter of Asad b. HAshim b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 17
